results.title: Chinese company releases world's largest open-source AI model
results.description: SHANGHAI, July 16 (Xinhua) -- Chinese artificial intelligence (AI) startup Moonshot AI on Thursday released its latest model, Kimi K3, which features 2.8 trillion parameters, making it the largest-parameter open-source AI model globally, the company said.

results.title: Cadient Launches SmartRegistryTM to Help Healthcare Employers Find Qualified Clinicians Before They Apply
results.description: /PRNewswire-PRWeb/ -- Cadient, the pioneer of the intelligent AI high-volume hiring platform, today announced the launch of SmartRegistryTM, an AI-powered...
